posts.author: MTB_Mom (Rachel Pomeroy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I tried using Zapier to send individual records from zeffy to Monday.com when they come in, but I was not able to figure out how to get them to go to different boards . Example - I have more than one kind of “campaign” in zeffy, one for memberships, and one for buying a product. I created an automation to “create a new item” in a board when I get a notification record from zeffy, but it isn’t specific enough in the zapier zap to tell me which board to map it to. Does anyone know how to do that? Reluctant to subscribe to zapier until I figure that out.
